description.en: Append additional CSV data to an existing subscriber import that is still in draft status.
description.de: Weitere CSV-Daten zu einem bestehenden Abonnenten-Import im Entwurfsstatus hinzufügen.
description.es: Append additional CSV data to an existing subscriber import that is still in draft status.

description.en: The UUID of the subscriber import to append to.

description.fr: The UUID of the subscriber import to append to.
description.ro: The UUID of the subscriber import to append to.
description.it: The UUID of the subscriber import to append to.

description.en: Additional CSV data to append. Must use the same column structure as the original import.
